I sent it to my list of 2,300 people and of the 2,300 people, 312 people said yes. Of those, 74 percent said yes to Jeff and 74 percent yes to one of my managers. Bingo, there you are, 228 clients just waiting for you. I've only got 50 spots who wants them. Right? Then I played further games with the math. I really wasn't playing any real games at all, but I mailed that first email out to the survey to 2,000 people. That's 2,000 of my hyper-responsives. It wasn't my whole list of 70 or 80,000 people. Then I said, what if I sent that email to my, I asked them that. You know I've got 70,000 other people, I only sent this to 2,000. Is there a demand? Yes, there's a demand. You want one of those 50 spots? My $800,000 bet, I went into that. Okay, 50 of you, you're spending five. I'm only asking for $5,000 down, it's $25,000 program. That means I'm taking a $20,000 bet on each one of you. I'm taking an $800,000 gamble that I can actually teach this and make you into marketing gods. So in other words, you know, it's a little bit more playing with the math. Then coming out of that event, obviously had some great successes because we handpicked these people. Jonathan Drake, no list, no product, no launch experience. $18,000 payday as a product launch manager. He did it in just 10 days, literally the first 10 days after he left the program. Brandon Fredrickson, more than a half a million dollars in debt due to medical bills. One of the objections I knew I would get is, what if I live in Malaysia or what if I live in Russia or what if I live in Northern California, whatever. There's always the objection, right? Well I showed him Brandon, geography doesn't matter, because he was actually quarantined in a hospital room when he ran that launch. 100% true, the guy at a staff infection ran the launch from the hotel room. Can't make that stuff up. More proof, just piling on proof. This is where I basically, this is between the first launch and the second launch. I basically went and I created a directory that I would list my product launch managers in and then I emailed my big list and I said, hey do you want to have access to my product launch managers? Go here and bingo, we had 1,100 people sign up literally overnight for this list. So those are just some of the things we built in. We stacked one thing after another and we got a lot of them on this list. It's basically, you've got the gold right here and it's just thinking about how can you take your assets and build them into a process where you're leveraging as many of these as possible. So our results, the initial event brought, you know we sold that thing out, it brought in about 300k. The home study, we rolled that thing out, we sold 440 of them at 5,000 bucks. We also had a six pay at $1,000 a month. So we did about 2.5 million on that, created a coaching group. We did, I did generate client income. In other words, I had product launch managers running launches and we were getting a portion of that and we extended our brand. Now we did have some messiness. One of the, there's the last thing I'll leave you with is it wasn't all beauty and grace because I had complete control over my brand prior to this and after it now I had hundreds of people running around telling the world they were Jeff Walker this and Jeff Walker that. And it did create a little bit of messiness for the brand. We did have a pretty tight relationship with them so we were able to manage it fairly well but it's just, there was definitely some messiness there. So I think that's all I got, yep, that's it.
